underlying_goal: Extend a jellyfin-downloader app to support YouTube channel URLs in addition to playlist URLs, and maintain the codebase documentation
friction_detail: The implemented feature caused a runtime error when clicking the watches tab, requiring a follow-up bugfix.
brief_summary: User wanted to create CLAUDE.md docs and add YouTube channel URL support; feature was implemented with tests passing but had a runtime bug on the watches page that was being addressed when session ended.
